title: hieracium lactucella subsp. nanum
intro: Hieracium lactucella subsp. nanum, also known as a small-flowered hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium lactucella subsp. nanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, Hieracium lactucella subsp. nanum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
